changeSet.author: m.groppe
changeSet.sql: insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, ISACTIVE, CONTACT_ID, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select UUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'EMAIL', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') and COMMUNICATION.ISSTANDARD = 1 where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_COMMUNICATION' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.MEDIUM = 'CAMPAIGNEMAIL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID = 'COMMEMAIL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select NEWID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'EMAIL', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') and COMMUNICATION.ISSTANDARD = 1 where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_COMMUNICATION' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.MEDIUM = 'CAMPAIGNEMAIL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID = 'COMMEMAIL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select uuid_in(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text)::cstring), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'EMAIL', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') and COMMUNICATION.ISSTANDARD = 1 where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_COMMUNICATION' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.MEDIUM = 'CAMPAIGNEMAIL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID = 'COMMEMAIL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select SYS_GUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'EMAIL', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') and COMMUNICATION.ISSTANDARD = 1 where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_COMMUNICATION' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.MEDIUM = 'CAMPAIGNEMAIL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID = 'COMMEMAIL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select UUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'PHONE', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') and COMMUNICATION.ISSTANDARD = 1 where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_COMMUNICATION' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.MEDIUM in ('CAMPAIGNPHONE', 'CAMPAIGNFAX', 'CAMPAIGNSMS') and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID in ('COMMPHONE', 'COMMMOBIL') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select NEWID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'PHONE', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') and COMMUNICATION.ISSTANDARD = 1 where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_COMMUNICATION' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.MEDIUM in ('CAMPAIGNPHONE', 'CAMPAIGNFAX', 'CAMPAIGNSMS') and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID in ('COMMPHONE', 'COMMMOBIL') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select uuid_in(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text)::cstring), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'PHONE', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') and COMMUNICATION.ISSTANDARD = 1 where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_COMMUNICATION' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.MEDIUM in ('CAMPAIGNPHONE', 'CAMPAIGNFAX', 'CAMPAIGNSMS') and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID in ('COMMPHONE', 'COMMMOBIL') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select SYS_GUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'PHONE', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') and COMMUNICATION.ISSTANDARD = 1 where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_COMMUNICATION' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.MEDIUM in ('CAMPAIGNPHONE', 'CAMPAIGNFAX', 'CAMPAIGNSMS') and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID in ('COMMPHONE', 'COMMMOBIL') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select UUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, ADDRESS.ADDRESSID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, concat_ws(', ', trim(ADDRESS.ADDRESS), trim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO), trim(ADDRESS.ZIP), trim(ADDRESS.CITY), trim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER)) from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join CONTACT on COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID join ADDRESS on CONTACT.ADDRESS_ID = ADDRESS.ADDRESSID where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and ADDRESS.ADDRESSID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select NEWID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, ADDRESS.ADDRESSID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.ADDRESS, ''))) + case when ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO is not null and ltrim(rtrim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO)) != '' then ', ' else '' end + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO, ''))) + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.COUNTRY, ''))) + case when ADDRESS.ZIP is not null and ltrim(rtrim(ADDRESS.ZIP)) != '' then ', ' else '' end + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.ZIP, ''))) + case when ADDRESS.CITY is not null and ltrim(rtrim(ADDRESS.CITY)) != '' then ', ' else '' end + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.CITY, ''))) + case when ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER is not null and ltrim(rtrim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER)) != '' then ', ' else '' end + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER, ''))) from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join CONTACT on COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID join ADDRESS on CONTACT.ADDRESS_ID = ADDRESS.ADDRESSID where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and ADDRESS.ADDRESSID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select uuid_in(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text)::cstring), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, ADDRESS.ADDRESSID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, concat_ws(', ', trim(ADDRESS.ADDRESS), trim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO), trim(ADDRESS.ZIP), trim(ADDRESS.CITY), trim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER)) from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join CONTACT on COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID join ADDRESS on CONTACT.ADDRESS_ID = ADDRESS.ADDRESSID where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and ADDRESS.ADDRESSID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select SYS_GUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, ADDRESS.ADDRESSID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, trim(ADDRESS.ADDRESS) || case when trim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO) is not null then ', ' else '' end || trim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO) || case when trim(ADDRESS.ZIP) is not null then ', ' else '' end || trim(ADDRESS.ZIP) || case when trim(ADDRESS.CITY) is not null then ', ' else '' end || trim(ADDRESS.CITY) || case when trim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER) is not null then ', ' else '' end || trim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER) from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join CONTACT on COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID join ADDRESS on CONTACT.ADDRESS_ID = ADDRESS.ADDRESSID where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and ADDRESS.ADDRESSID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, ISACTIVE, CONTACT_ID, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select UUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'EMAIL', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID = 'COMMEMAIL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select NEWID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'EMAIL', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID = 'COMMEMAIL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select uuid_in(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text)::cstring), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'EMAIL', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID = 'COMMEMAIL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select SYS_GUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'EMAIL', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID = 'COMMEMAIL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select UUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'PHONE', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID in ('COMMPHONE', 'COMMMOBIL') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select NEWID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'PHONE', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID in ('COMMPHONE', 'COMMMOBIL') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select uuid_in(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text)::cstring), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'PHONE', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID in ('COMMPHONE', 'COMMMOBIL') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select SYS_GUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'PHONE', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, COMMUNICATION.ADDR from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join COMMUNICATION on COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID and COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE in ('Person', 'Organisation') where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATION.MEDIUM_ID in ('COMMPHONE', 'COMMMOBIL') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and COMMUNICATION.COMMUNICATIONID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select UUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, ADDRESS.ADDRESSID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, concat_ws(', ', trim(ADDRESS.ADDRESS), trim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO), trim(ADDRESS.ZIP), trim(ADDRESS.CITY), trim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER)) from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join CONTACT on COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID join ADDRESS on ADDRESS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and ADDRESS.ADDRESSID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select NEWID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, ADDRESS.ADDRESSID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.ADDRESS, ''))) + case when ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO is not null and ltrim(rtrim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO)) != '' then ', ' else '' end + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO, ''))) + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.COUNTRY, ''))) + case when ADDRESS.ZIP is not null and ltrim(rtrim(ADDRESS.ZIP)) != '' then ', ' else '' end + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.ZIP, ''))) + case when ADDRESS.CITY is not null and ltrim(rtrim(ADDRESS.CITY)) != '' then ', ' else '' end + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.CITY, ''))) + case when ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER is not null and ltrim(rtrim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER)) != '' then ', ' else '' end + ltrim(rtrim(isnull(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER, ''))) from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join CONTACT on COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID join ADDRESS on ADDRESS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and ADDRESS.ADDRESSID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select uuid_in(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text)::cstring), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, ADDRESS.ADDRESSID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, concat_ws(', ', trim(ADDRESS.ADDRESS), trim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO), trim(ADDRESS.ZIP), trim(ADDRESS.CITY), trim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER)) from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join CONTACT on COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID join ADDRESS on ADDRESS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and ADDRESS.ADDRESSID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);

insert into COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS (COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID, CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, CHANNEL_TYPE, STATUS, DATE_NEW, USER_NEW , CHANNEL_ID, DATE_EDIT, USER_EDIT, INFO, ADDRESS) select SYS_GUID(), COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID, ISACTIVE, 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_ADDRESS', COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_NEW, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_NEW, ADDRESS.ADDRESSID, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.DATE_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.USER_EDIT, COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.INFO, trim(ADDRESS.ADDRESS) || case when trim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO) is not null then ', ' else '' end || trim(ADDRESS.BUILDINGNO) || case when trim(ADDRESS.ZIP) is not null then ', ' else '' end || trim(ADDRESS.ZIP) || case when trim(ADDRESS.CITY) is not null then ', ' else '' end || trim(ADDRESS.CITY) || case when trim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER) is not null then ', ' else '' end || trim(ADDRESS.ADDRIDENTIFIER) from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS join COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE on COMMUNICATIONLEGALBASE.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS_ID = COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.COMMUNICATIONSETTINGSID join CONTACT on COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID join ADDRESS on ADDRESS.CONTACT_ID = CONTACT.CONTACTID where COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_TYPE = 'COMMUNICATIONCHANNEL_GLOBAL' and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.CHANNEL_ID is null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.STATUS IN ('COMMUNICATION_REJECTED', 'COMMUNICATION_ALLOWED') and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1 and ADDRESS.ADDRESSID not in (select CHANNEL_ID from COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS where CHANNEL_ID is not null and COMMUNICATIONSETTINGS.ISACTIVE = 1);
